name: plugins
description: Claude Code & Nexgent plugin collection — team coordination, multi-perspective code review, and systematic literature review.

plugins.name: team-coord
plugins.description: Two subskills for agent team coordination — team-coord:lead orchestrates a team (pure coordinator, never does actual work), team-coord:teammate guides each worker (executes tasks, returns raw findings). Covers inbox sync protocol, WHAT vs HOW spawn philosophy, and unified report synthesis.

plugins.name: adversarial-review
plugins.description: Multi-perspective code review with 6 analysis lenses (security, performance, architecture, code quality, test quality, API design), unified findings format, health scoring (0-100), and iterative fix loop.

plugins.name: lit-review
plugins.description: Systematic literature review pipeline — multi-source academic search (arXiv, Semantic Scholar), citation network analysis, subtopic decomposition, and structured review synthesis.
